sections.paragraph:
Original: הון

Transliteration: hôn

Phonetic: hone

BDB Definition:

  1. wealth, riches, substance (noun masculine)
    1. wealth
    2. price, high value
  2. enough!, sufficiency (interjection)

Origin: from the same as H1951 in the sense of H202

TWOT entry: 487a

Part(s) of speech:
